title: Sunfur Edit
description: A vanilla-like texturepack featuring dark-mode, custom sky, 3D details for blocks and some small texture tweaks to make the game look more dynamic.
body:
A vanilla-like texturepack featuring dark-mode, custom sky, 3D details for blocks and some small texture tweaks like slightly lower grass to make the game look more dynamic. (Also removes these creepy cave sounds because I really don't like them)

**Requires Optifine or mods with similar resourcepack support to work properly.**

**Custom features include:**
- **Skybox**
- **3d block models**
- **3d doors**
- **Lower grass** (other low grass texturepacks make the grass _too_ low, so I made my own lol)
- **high-quality sun and moon**
- **weather effects**
- **block variants**
- **fancy dark UI**\
...and some more I didn't mention here because they are very small features.

This texturepack is available in other variants.

## [Available Sunfur Edit Variants](https://modrinth.com/collection/YYDST57h)
### Overview:
|**[Sunfur Edit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit):**|Custom Sky|Custom 3d Models|Fancy Dark UI|
|---------------------|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------|
| **[Sunfur Edit - low:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit-low)**|Only Sun & Moon|No custom models|Fancy Dark UI|
| **[Shader Friendly:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunfur-edit-shader-friendly)**|No Custom Sky|Custom 3d Models|Fancy Dark UI|

The low version **doesn't require Optifine**. It is also strongly optimised for performance and file size.

Please note that **minecraft versions newer than 1.20.1 are not supported** and will cause some textures to behave differently as intended.
